headline: Trane Technologies Optimizes Industry‑First Thermal Management Reference Design for AI Factories, Introduces Two New Designs
summary: SWORDS, Ireland, March 16, 2026--Trane Technologies (NYSE:TT), a global climate innovator, today announced major enhancements to its industry-first comprehensive thermal management reference design for gigawatt-scale AI factories and unveiled two Trane Continuum Rubin DSX reference designs.

headline: 3 Quality Compounders to Own for Decades
summary: Quality compounders are flywheels. Said differently, they’re businesses that generate heaps of profits and consistently reinvest them to produce even more profits. Rinse and repeat.
